title: coniogramme japonica
intro: Coniogramme japonica, also known as Japanese parsley fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Compositae family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and roots, which contain bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coniogramme japonica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Coniogramme japonica is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Asia.
